entry: Today's note: The drop×bounce lab found a 4.974%/trade edge at drop 6.0%→target 6.0%, and regime classification is live on 4 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting. The edge is still marginal, but it's measured, and measured beats hoped.
good_signals: the drop×bounce lab found a 4.974%/trade edge at drop 6.0%→target 6.0%
regime classification is live on 4 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting
what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
